name: erc-awar
description: Reference implementation and adapters for Agent Memory State ExperienceDelta v1.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @erc-awar/core build && pnpm --filter @erc-awar/reference-engine build && pnpm --filter @erc-awar/awareness-adapter build && pnpm --filter @erc-awar/minimal-independent build && pnpm --filter @erc-awar/examples build
scripts.check: pnpm clean && pnpm build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present test && pnpm test:contracts
